description: Review fixes: Fix online learning dead code, add meta-learner data cap, add pipeline TODO, make spread filter configurable, verify Monte Carlo performance.
steps: Fix online_update() in models/ensemble.py to call model() directly instead of model.predict() for differentiable tensor output
Add max_samples cap (5000) to save_stacked_predictions() in models/ensemble.py, dropping oldest when exceeded
Add TODO comment in main.py noting pipeline_manager is ready but not yet wired into run_cycle
Add max_absolute_spread field to SpreadGateConfig in config/settings.py and use it in signal_generator.py instead of hardcoded 80
Verify Monte Carlo trades_forward=20 (acceptable, no change needed)
acceptance_criteria: online_update() calls model forward pass directly (model(x_tensor)) instead of model.predict()
save_stacked_predictions() caps at 5000 samples, dropping oldest
main.py has TODO comment about pipeline not yet wired into run_cycle
SpreadGateConfig has max_absolute_spread field used in signal_generator
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Claude/NeuroX/neurox_v4 && python -m pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -20
findings: All 5 review items addressed. online_update() now correctly calls model() forward pass and returns True (14 models updated). Meta-learner cap verified at 5000 samples. Monte Carlo trades_forward=20 confirmed (no change needed). SpreadGateConfig.max_absolute_spread added. 532 tests pass.
